body.title: CLOSED: Librarian research and summarization workflows
body.result: ResearchEngine + 3 MCP tools + manifest entries; 14 tests; 8f6411c
body.description:
Add research and summarization as first-class Librarian capabilities. Usable by CC, Igor, or Akien via channel or MCP.

Capabilities:
- summarize(text_or_url, style='brief|detailed|bullets') — uses Tier 1 model
- research(query, depth='shallow|deep') — multi-step: search → fetch → synthesize
- build_summary(ticket_id_or_topic) — summarize a ticket + linked context

All results posted back to the requesting channel or returned via MCP.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/research.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; results posted via bus/channel
**Scope boundary:** research + summarization only; no autonomous action-taking
**Test plan:** summarize() returns non-empty for a known text; research() returns structured result dict
